description: Declares a single dependency relationship. The record author depends on the referenced entity.

main.description: A single dependency pointer. The uri is a DID or hostname identifying the upstream entity.

uri.description: The dependency identifier: a DID (did:plc:..., did:web:...) or a hostname (example.com).

label.description: Optional human-readable name for this dependency (e.g. 'Bluesky', 'AT Protocol').
